---
format: 
  pdf:
    fig-dpi: 600
execute:
    echo: false
    warning: false
    message: false
---

```{r}
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| echo: false

library(tidyverse)

set.seed(3141)

# Data from Shiny app
library(RSQLite)
conn <- dbConnect(SQLite(), "../../shiny-apps/experiment-heat3d/data/stat218-summer2025.db")
blocks <- dbReadTable(conn, "blocks")
exp_results <- dbReadTable(conn, "exp_results")
users <- dbReadTable(conn, "users")
dbDisconnect(conn)

# Solutions
solutions <- readRDS("../../data/solutions.rda")

# Pre-processing of results
results <- exp_results %>%
  filter(set != "practice") %>%
  group_by(user_id) %>%
  arrange(start_time) %>%
  mutate(user_seq = ifelse(user_trial_order > lag(user_trial_order), 0, 1),
         user_seq = ifelse(start_time == min(start_time), 0, user_seq)) %>%
  mutate(user_seq = cumsum(user_seq)) %>%
  left_join(blocks, by = "user_id", relationship = 'many-to-many') %>%
  group_by(user_id, user_seq) %>%
  filter(system_time < min(start_time)) %>%
  mutate(time_diff_block = min(start_time) - system_time) %>%
  filter(time_diff_block == min(time_diff_block)) %>%
  filter(user_seq == min(user_seq))

# Get user sequences with full completions
full_completions <- results %>%
  group_by(user_id, user_seq, block) %>%
  count() %>%
  filter(n %in% c(16,24))

# Inner join to filter
results <- inner_join(results, full_completions) %>%
  select(-c(time_diff_block, n)) %>%
  ungroup()

# Join with results and filter so that only first completed block is there
results <- left_join(results, solutions) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  group_by(user_id) %>%
  filter(system_time == min(system_time))

results$pair_id <- factor(results$pair_id)

# Prepare data for Q2
res_q2 <- results %>%
  mutate(target_ratio = 100*true_ratio,
         target_size = ifelse(z > 50, 50, z*true_ratio),
         target_diff = z-target_size,
         q1_status = ifelse(user_larger == true_larger, 'correct', 'incorrect')) %>%
  # filter(pair_id != 5) %>%
  group_by(user_id, block) %>%
  mutate(prop_correct = mean(user_larger==true_larger))

# Get unique user IDs
user_ids <- unique(res_q2$user_id)
```

# Legend

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| fig-width: 8
#| fig-height: 4

library(cowplot)

# Create a dummy plot to extract legends from - include all media types
dummy_data <- res_q2 %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(user_slider, target_ratio, target_diff, target_size),
               names_to = 'point') %>%
  mutate(q1_status = ifelse(point != 'user_slider', 'target', q1_status),
         media = factor(media, levels = c('2dd', '3dd', '3dp'))) %>%
  # Ensure all media types are represented
  group_by(media) %>%
  slice(1) %>%
  ungroup()

# Plot for line/color legend - use original data
line_data <- res_q2 %>%
  filter(user_id == user_ids[1]) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(user_slider, target_ratio, target_diff, target_size),
               names_to = 'point') %>%
  mutate(q1_status = ifelse(point != 'user_slider', 'target', q1_status))

p_lines <- ggplot(line_data, aes(x = user_trial_order, y = value, 
                                   linetype = point, color = point, alpha = point)) +
  geom_line() +
  scale_color_manual(name = "Variable",
                     values = c(
                       'user_slider'='black',
                       'target_ratio'='black',
                       'target_diff'='#1a80bb',
                       'target_size'='#a00000'
                     ),
                     labels = c('user_slider' = 'User Slider',
                                'target_ratio' = 'Target Ratio',
                                'target_diff' = 'Target Difference',
                                'target_size' = 'Target Size')) +
  scale_linetype_manual(name = "Variable",
                        values = c(
                          'user_slider'='solid',
                          'target_ratio'='longdash',
                          'target_diff'='dotted',
                          'target_size'='dotdash'
                        ),
                        labels = c('user_slider' = 'User Slider',
                                   'target_ratio' = 'Target Ratio',
                                   'target_diff' = 'Target Difference',
                                   'target_size' = 'Target Size')) +
  scale_alpha_manual(name = "Variable",
                     values = c(
                       'user_slider'=1,
                       'target_ratio'=0.5,
                       'target_diff'=0.5,
                       'target_size'=0.5
                     ),
                     labels = c('user_slider' = 'User Slider',
                                'target_ratio' = 'Target Ratio',
                                'target_diff' = 'Target Difference',
                                'target_size' = 'Target Size')) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

# Plot for media legend
p_media <- ggplot(dummy_data, aes(x = user_trial_order, y = 100)) +
  geom_col(aes(fill = media), width = 1) +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "Media",
                    values = c(
                      '2dd'='#d4d4d4',
                      '3dd'='#595959',
                      '3dp'='#7f7f7f'
                    ),
                    labels = c('2dd' = '2D Digital',
                               '3dd' = '3D Digital',
                               '3dp' = '3D Printed'),
                    drop = FALSE) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

# Plot for shape legend
p_shape <- ggplot(line_data, aes(x = user_trial_order, y = value)) +
  geom_point(aes(shape = q1_status)) +
  scale_shape_manual(name = "Q1 Status",
                     values = c('correct' = 1, 'incorrect' = 4, 'target' = 16),
                     labels = c('correct' = 'Correct',
                                'incorrect' = 'Incorrect',
                                'target' = 'Target')) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

# Extract legends
legend_lines <- get_legend(p_lines)
legend_media <- get_legend(p_media)
legend_shape <- get_legend(p_shape)

# Combine legends in rows
legend_row1 <- legend_lines
legend_row2 <- plot_grid(legend_media, legend_shape, nrow = 1)

# Final combined legend
final_legend <- plot_grid(legend_row1, legend_row2, ncol = 1)

print(final_legend)
```

\newpage

# User Plots

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| fig-width: 8
#| fig-height: 3.5

for (i in seq_along(user_ids)) {
  uid <- user_ids[i]
#for (i in 1:4) {
#  uid <- user_ids[i]
  # Get prop_correct for this user
  prop_correct_val <- res_q2 %>%
    filter(user_id == uid) %>%
    pull(prop_correct) %>%
    first() %>%
    round(3)
  
  p <- res_q2 %>%
    filter(user_id == uid) %>%
    pivot_longer(cols = c(user_slider, target_ratio, target_diff, target_size),
                 names_to = 'point') %>%
    mutate(q1_status = ifelse(point != 'user_slider', 'target', q1_status)) %>% 
    ggplot(mapping = aes(x = user_trial_order,
                         y = value)) +
    geom_col(aes(y = 100, fill = media), width = 1, alpha = 1/4) +
    geom_point(aes(shape = q1_status, color = point,
                         alpha = point)) +
    geom_line(aes(color = point,
                         alpha = point, linetype = point)) +
    scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 100)) +
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(1,24, by = 1)) +
    scale_shape_manual(values = c('correct' = 1, 'incorrect' = 4, 'target' = 16)) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c(
      'user_slider'='black',
      'target_ratio'='black',
      'target_diff'='#1a80bb',
      'target_size'='#a00000'
    )) +
    scale_linetype_manual(values = c(
      'user_slider'='solid',
      'target_ratio'='longdash',
      'target_diff'='dotted',
      'target_size'='dotdash'
    )) +
    scale_alpha_manual(values = c(
      'user_slider'=1,
      'target_ratio'=0.5,
      'target_diff'=0.5,
      'target_size'=0.5
    )) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c(
      '2dd'='#d4d4d4',
      '3dd'='#595959',
      '3dp'='#7f7f7f'
    )) + 
    labs(caption = paste0("Proportion Correct: ", prop_correct_val),
         title = paste0("User ID: ", uid),
         x = 'Trial Number', y = 'Slider Position') +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(aspect.ratio = 1/2, 
          legend.position = 'none',
          panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank())
  
  print(p)
  
}
```
